SiteHeader.search2: Find great deals on phones, laptops, and more…

SiteFooter.description: Cheappis is a free marketplace for buying and selling used tech products in Cyprus.

HomePage.heroBadge: The new experience in tech classifieds
HomePage.heroTitle: The new era of used <tech>tech products</tech> in <country>Cyprus</country>
HomePage.heroSubtitle: Discover amazing products from local sellers. Browse a wide range of categories and find exactly what you need at the best prices.
HomePage.featuredDeals: {count, plural, =0 {No featured deals found} one {Featured Deal} other {Featured Deals}}
HomePage.recentListings: {count, plural, =0 {No recent listings found} one {Recent Listing} other {Recent Listings}}

SignInPage.title: Login to your account
SignInPage.subtitle: Enter your email below to login to your account

Listing.descriptionNotAvailable: The seller has not provided a description for this listing.
Listing.basedOnReviews: {reviews, plural, =0 {No reviews yet} one {Based on 1 review} other {Based on # reviews}}

page.title: New Listing
page.subtitle: Create a new listing by filling out the form below.

card.title: Create Your Listing
card.description: Add clear details and high-quality photos to improve buyer trust.

description.label: Description
description.placeholder: Describe condition, accessories, battery health, and reason for selling.

checklist.title: Publishing Checklist
checklist.description: Listings with complete info and clear images convert faster.

quality.title: Image quality
quality.body: Uploaded images are auto-optimized for fast loading and better user experience.

limit.title: Free plan limit
limit.body: You can add up to {max} images.

primary.title: Primary photo
primary.body: The first image appears as the cover in listing cards.

images.title: Listing Images
images.description: Upload images and preview each one before publishing.
images.helper: Supported formats: JPG, PNG, WebP, AVIF. Max {max} images and {maxMb}MB per file.

footer.note: By publishing, you confirm this listing follows marketplace rules.

errors.titleTooShort: Title must be at least 5 characters.
errors.titleTooLong: Title must be at most 120 characters.
errors.locationTooLong: Location must be at most 120 characters.
errors.descriptionTooLong: Description must be at most 5000 characters.
errors.invalidImageUrl: Each image must be a valid URL.
errors.noImagesSelected: At least one image is required.
errors.tooManyImages: Free users can add up to {max} images.
errors.unsupportedFileType: Unsupported image type. Use JPG, PNG, WebP, or AVIF.
errors.fileTooLarge: Each image must be smaller than {maxMb}MB.
errors.uploadFailed: Image upload failed. Please try again.
errors.invalidPrice: Price must be a valid number.
